tools.name: whoami
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Return the identity of the signed-in GSM Driving School user calling this MCP server (user id, email, and any admin role).

tools.name: list_areas
tools.title: List coverage areas
tools.description: List every London area GSM Driving School covers, with the primary postcode, nearby postcodes and a short description. Public information.

tools.name: list_lessons
tools.title: List driving lessons
tools.description: List every published GSM Driving School practical driving-strategy lesson (slug, title, Highway Code rule reference, short summary). Public information.

tools.name: contact_info
tools.title: GSM contact details
tools.description: Return GSM Driving School's public contact information (phone, WhatsApp, website) so an assistant can pass it to a learner.

tools.name: list_my_bookings
tools.title: List my lesson bookings
tools.description: List the signed-in GSM Plus learner's own lesson bookings (scheduled_at, duration, instructor, status). Row-level security scopes results to the caller.
